actions.name: Sighting System
actions.description: Effect: The user has +3 default ACC when using @Trait[pulse], @Trait[ray], @Trait[missile] and @Trait[explode] Attacks, and the user is Delayed X% upon using these Attacks, where X equals 110 minus the Attack’s base Accuracy.

system.description: Effect: The user has +3 default ACC when using @Trait[pulse], @Trait[ray], @Trait[missile] and @Trait[explode] Attacks, and the user is Delayed X% upon using these Attacks, where X equals 110 minus the Attack’s base Accuracy.
